task_completion.description: Agent logged into the FreeMED EMR application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeMED dashboard or interface is visible, indicating a successful login.

task_completion.description: Agent searched for and selected the patient Maria Santos.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The patient record or dashboard for 'Maria Santos' is open and visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: Agent opened the interface to add a new progress note or SOAP note.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A form or dialog for creating a new progress note or SOAP note is displayed.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the correct date and description/summary.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date field is set to today's date, and the description or summary field contains 'Hypertension follow-up'.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the Subjective and Objective information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subjective text area contains keywords like 'dizziness', 'lisinopril', 'morning', and the Objective text area contains values like '138', '88', '72', '165'.

task_completion.description: Agent entered the Assessment and Plan information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Assessment text area contains keywords like 'hypertension', 'orthostatic', 'adequate', and the Plan text area contains keywords like 'continue', '20mg', 'monitoring'.

task_completion.description: Agent saved the progress note to the patient's record.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A confirmation message indicating the note was saved successfully, or the newly created progress note is visible in Maria Santos's chart/record list.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the FreeMED web GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the FreeMED interface, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Agent entered the note into the actual FreeMED application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The SOAP note text is typed into the FreeMED web form fields, not just written in a separate text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not use database commands to insert the note.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing MySQL or database insertion commands are used to bypass the web interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Patient Name: Maria Santos. Subjective keywords to look for: dizziness, dizzy, compliant, lisinopril, morning. Objective keywords: 138, 88, 72, 165, regular, clear. Assessment keywords: hypertension, improving, goal, orthostatic, adequate. Plan keywords: continue, follow up, follow-up, sodium, increase, 20mg, monitoring.
